package.name: nav2_dstar_lite_planner
package.description: D* Lite incremental-search global planner for Nav2 (nav2_core::GlobalPlanner). Upstream Nav2 ships only one-shot search planners (NavFn, Smac, Theta*) that replan from scratch; this adds the incremental family: D* Lite caches g/rhs values from the goal-rooted search and repairs only the vertices whose costs change between cycles. Part of Nav2PlannerBattle: planners not in upstream Nav2.
